faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Kearny, NJ?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Kearny typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your property, the severity of the infestation, and the treatment method used. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing with no hidden fees, ensuring you understand the full scope of treatment before we begin.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in Kearny?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments in Kearny can be completed in 4-8 hours for heat treatments, or may require multiple visits over 2-3 weeks for chemical treatments. The timeline depends on your property size and infestation severity. We'll provide a detailed treatment schedule during your free inspection and work around your availability.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for my family and pets in Kearny?
faqs.answer: Yes, our bed bug treatments are completely safe when applied by our certified technicians. We use EPA-approved products and follow strict safety protocols. For heat treatments, no chemicals are needed at all. For chemical treatments, we provide clear instructions on any brief evacuation periods, and your home is safe for re-entry once the treatment has dried, typically within a few hours.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your bed bug treatment in Kearny?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We stand behind our bed bug treatments with a comprehensive warranty. If bed bugs return within the guarantee period (typically 30-90 days depending on the treatment plan), we'll retreat your Kearny property at no additional charge. We also provide follow-up inspections to ensure complete elimination and your peace of mind.
